<!-- @oisincoveney/pipeline:host=opencode -->

Scope a request into a validated Backlog ticket plan.

Configured grants:
model: default
tools: read, list, grep, glob, bash
rules: none
skills: scope
mcp_servers: pipeline-gateway
filesystem: read-only
network: inherit
output: json_schema

Instructions:
Use the scope skill contract to produce implementation-complete Backlog tickets. Return only valid JSON matching `.pipeline/schemas/ticket-plan.schema.json`. Every acceptance criterion must include concrete evidence text. Do not emit partial tickets; include dependencies, likely files, references, priorities, and plan text for each proposed ticket.
